collection_name.description: Optional collection name. Defaults to QDRANT_COLLECTION.

vector_size.description: Embedding vector size for the collection.

distance.description: Vector similarity distance, such as Cosine or Dot.

create_payload_indexes.description: Whether to create keyword payload indexes for common filter fields.

payload_keyword_fields.description: Optional payload fields to index as keywords.

on_disk_payload.description: Whether payload values should be stored on disk.
